lines.speaker: Ish the Navigator
lines.text: Be on your guard friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the Wintertodt.

lines.speaker: Ish the Navigator
lines.text: The Wintertodt terrorised Great Kourend many centuries ago. It destroyed much of this northern land over many years before it was finally driven back into this prison.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why did it attack Kourend?

lines.speaker: Ish the Navigator
lines.text: No one knows for sure but I have a theory...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Which is?

lines.speaker: Ish the Navigator
lines.text: The Dark Altar. It felt the altar's power and wanted to consume it for itself. It wouldn't be the first time...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about yourself.

lines.speaker: Ish the Navigator
lines.text: I'm Ish, one of the navigators of Piscarilius.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What brings a navigator up here?

lines.speaker: Ish the Navigator
lines.text: Lady Piscarilius has sent me here to keep an eye on the situation. She doesn't trust the other houses and believes something sinister is going on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Like what?

lines.speaker: Ish the Navigator
lines.text: I don't know, but I intend to find out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you think of the Pyromancers?

lines.speaker: Ish the Navigator
lines.text: I've heard stories about them and the things they have done over the years. Be careful, they can't be trusted.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You seem a bit paranoid.

lines.speaker: Ish the Navigator
lines.text: Better to be paranoid than a fool. Anyone with any sense knows that the Pyromancers are trouble. They say even Lord Arceuus doesn't trust them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have to go.

lines.speaker: Ish the Navigator
lines.text: Stay vigilant friend.
